content.en:
"Be careful!"

Hundreds of half-step True Ancestors were fighting each other for a strange treasure, the Glazed Green Fruit Tree, and suddenly felt a wave of killing intent to kill.

The glazed green fruit is a treasure that can improve the fit of the essence and spirit, if you eat too much, the probability of trying the fusion of the spirit and spirit in the future is relatively large.

Therefore, although the glazed green fruit cannot directly assist the way, it is very useful and has a very high value.

At this time, there were at least tens of thousands of glazed green fruits on this glazed green fruit tree, which naturally aroused the greed of many half-step true ancestors present.

But they didn't fight at the first time, but confronted each other and discussed how to divide these fruits, after all, the value of the glazed green fruit was not big enough for them to fight.

However, they didn't expect that someone else would dare to unleash such a strong killing intent on them, which was equivalent to angering everyone at once.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Hundreds of half-step True Ancestors released their momentum at the same time, crushing towards the comer.

Bang!!!

The void opened, and three figures appeared, and they were three-headed abyssal monsters.

"Abyssal Monster!"

There was a half-step True Ancestor who was shocked.

"No, it should be a disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect!" a half-step True Ancestor said solemnly.

"I didn't expect you to really know our identity, then you must die!" said one of the abyssal monsters in a cold voice.

Kill!

The three abyssal monsters were killed, and their terrifying strength was instantly revealed, killing a half-step true ancestor in an instant at a rapid speed.

The fight has begun!

The three abyssal demons were too strong, and the hundreds of half-step true ancestors did not have that kind of half-step true ancestor at the level of a true genius, and they couldn't stop the three abyss demons at all for a while.

Although some of these half-step True Ancestors had some hole cards, they could injure an Abyss Monster at most, and once they couldn't kill the Abyss Monster, they healed quickly with their recovery speed.

It is precisely because of this terrifying physique that the abyssal monsters are so feared, and the Infinite Abyss has become one of the forbidden places.

Time passed slowly, and hundreds of half-step true ancestors were almost killed in a short time, and only one half-step true ancestor escaped with a escape-type arcana.

This is not just happening here, but everywhere in the Infinite Abyss Fragments.

However, there are accidents.

For example, some unlucky disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect encountered the kind of top-notch genius half-step true ancestor with powerful hole cards, and were besieged and killed by multiple half-step true ancestors at a heavy price.

There were also some disciples of the Royal Beast Sect who met Ye Tian and were easily killed by Ye Tian.

----------

"Sixth!"

Ye Tian casually killed a disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect, confiscated the treasures on his body, and muttered.

Due to the large size of the Wuji Abyss fragments, the disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect were relatively scattered, and they were always in a state of movement, so it was difficult to find the disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect, so more than ten days had passed before six disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect were killed.

"Hey, there are actually two Harmony Treasures!"

Ye Tian was ecstatic.

Previously, he had killed five disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect, but he had only obtained four Merge Dao treasures, one of them did not have Merge Dao treasures, and obviously not every disciple of the Royal Beast Sect would be able to find the Merge Dao treasures.

And the dead disciple of the Royal Beast Sect in front of him seemed to be lucky enough to find two Merge Dao treasures, but now they both belonged to Ye Tian.

With the death of a disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect, Mo En was also anxious.

If it was the Imperial Beast Sect at its peak, Mo En didn't care about the death of a few half-step True Ancestors at all, even if he died hundreds, thousands, or even tens of thousands, he wouldn't care at all.

But now it's different, when the domain realm was shattered, the Imperial Beast Sect also suffered heavy losses, and only some remnants were left to follow the fragments of the domain to shuttle through the dark forbidden realm.

Before shuttling through the Dark Forbidden Domain, most of the ordinary disciples were directly abandoned, and only a group of elites participated in the plan to transform abyss monsters.

In terms of quantity, there are not many abyssal monsters in the Royal Beast Sect, only tens of thousands, but now there are only a few thousand abyss monsters with real attributes.

For a long time in the next few years, it would be difficult for the abyss monsters of the Imperial Beast Sect to increase, so if one died, there would be one less, and if any disciple died, it would be a huge loss.

I don't know when, the news that the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect have the treasure of the Harmony Dao was publicized.

As a result, all the half-step True Ancestors went crazy.

The Abyss Monster of the Royal Beast Sect is indeed very strong, but it is not impossible to kill, as long as you pay the price, you can still kill it.

What is the concept of the treasure of the Dao Sect, it is the treasure of the road to the Dao Ancestor!

One by one, the top great forces began to gather half-step true ancestors, and even several big forces joined forces, often hundreds or even thousands of half-step true ancestors joined forces, and their combat effectiveness suddenly exploded.

It can be said that as long as they don't encounter multiple abyssal monsters, they won't be okay at all.

At the beginning, under the joint efforts of many half-step true ancestors, an abyssal monster of the Famous Imperial Beast Sect died tragically, and the half-step true ancestor died even more, often fighting to kill dozens of half-step true ancestors to be able to truly kill an abyss monster.

But even with such a heavy price, many half-step true ancestors still took risks, because some half-step true ancestors really lived the treasures of the Convergence Dao.

At this time, the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect were also confused.

For them, although the Hedao treasure is precious, it is not precious to such a crazy degree, mainly because they occupy the Infinite Abyss, so it is easy to obtain the Hedao treasure, so they do not feel too precious.

But for the half-step True Ancestor of this barren realm, the value of a Merge Dao treasure was too high, enough to make them crazy and even fight to the death.

The wrong estimation caused the Imperial Beast Sect to suffer heavy losses.

In this era, there is no shortage of half-step true ancestors among the major forces, as long as the major forces are given time, they can definitely cultivate more half-step true ancestors, what is really lacking is Dao ancestors and the opportunity to join the Dao.

One after another the Abyss Monsters of the Imperial Beast Sect died, and the number gradually rose to a hundred, while the number of half-step True Ancestors who died was close to ten thousand.

But compared to the total number of half-step True Ancestors, a mere 10,000 half-step True Ancestors was nothing.

Therefore, the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect panicked, and they didn't even dare to go out, but hid one by one.

However, hiding was not the solution to the problem, and many of the formation prohibitions they had arranged before were destroyed one by one, which simply ruined the plan of the Imperial Beast Sect.

If the high-level leaders of the Imperial Beast Sect woke up and saw such a situation, their disciples would definitely have no good fruit to eat.

So, Morn wasn't ready to stay behind the scenes.

He's ready to take it personally!
